name: True Blood (Requested) // RPG
description:
TRUE BLOOD

Bon Temps, Louisiana // Population: 3,500 souls + others

Two years ago, vampires "came out of the coffin." Thanks to the invention of TruBlood—synthetic blood that allows them to survive without feeding on humans, the undead are trying to integrate into society. Some support them. Most fear them. And in the deep, humid bayous of Louisiana, the tension is thick enough to choke on.

This is Bon Temps. A small town where everyone knows everyone, secrets fester under the surface, and the supernatural isn't just a rumor, it's your neighbor, your lover, or your killer. Here, you'll find vampires with varying degrees of humanity, werewolves running with packs, shape-shifters hiding in plain sight, and humans caught in the crossfire.

The Bloodlines & Factions

VAMPIRES

Ancient politics, blood bonds, and the Authority. Some seek peace, others remember when humans were prey. Powers include glamour, super strength, and immortality, but also vulnerability to sunlight, silver, and stakes.

SHAPESHIFTERS & WEREWOLVES

Pack dynamics, territory wars, and the pull of the moon. Werewolves run in packs with strict hierarchies. Shapeshifters are loners, able to take one animal form. Both are hunted by hate groups.

HUMANS & OTHERS

Telepaths like Sookie. Vampire zealots in the Fellowship of the Sun. Law enforcement trying to keep order. And the everyday people of Bon Temps just trying to live alongside the supernatural.

Define Your Nature

CUSTOM CHARACTER — THE MAIN PATH

SPECIES

  • Vampire: How old are you? Do you follow the Authority or reject it?

  • Werewolf/Shapeshifter: Pack member or lone wolf? What's your form?

  • Human: Do you have a gift (telepathy, visions)? Or are you ordinary?

  • Other: Fairy, maenad, or something stranger.

ROLE & ALLEGIANCE

  • Bon Temps local or outsider

  • Fangtasia employee or regular

  • Fellowship of the Sun member

  • Law enforcement or hunter

  • Unaffiliated — just surviving

YOUR ENTRY POINT

  • Before the vampire revelation

  • In the chaos of Season 1/Book 1

  • During the Authority's rise

  • After the main events

You may choose to replace a canon character and walk their path. Take Sookie's place as the telepathic waitress entangled with vampires. Become Bill, the Confederate-turned-vampire. Step into Eric's role as the Viking Sheriff. Or take any other character from the series, Lafayette, Jessica, Pam, Alcide, Russell Edgington. Their story becomes yours to continue or alter. If not specified, canon characters exist as NPCs in t
